channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Scottie Scheffler gets a break from an azalea, escapes a magnolia and trails by 3 at the Masters
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Even the azaleas at Augusta National seem to love Scottie Scheffler. The magnolia trees weren't so friendly, though.
item.dc:creator: BEN NUCKOLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Piastri on pole and Norris only sixth in qualifying for F1's Bahrain Grand Prix
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Oscar Piastri took pole in qualifying for the Bahrain Grand Prix on Saturday as his McLaren teammate and Formula 1 standings leader Lando Norris could only manage sixth. George Russell was a surprisingly strong challenger and took second for Mercedes, .
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Race fans brace the rain for 1st race of Spring Tripleheader in Bristol Motor Speedway
item.description: Despite the weather, fans still showed up to enjoy the Bristol Motor Speedway on Friday night to see their favorite NASCAR drivers.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: MLB umpire called 'perfect game' in Royals win over Twins, metrics tracking shows
item.description: The Royals defeated the Twins on Thursday. Umpire Scorecards shined a light on MLB umpire Mark Ripperger for what they concluded was a perfectly called game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: De Bruyne sparks Man City comeback win as Arsenal and Forest stumble in Premier League
item.description: Kevin De Bruyne sparked Manchester City’s remarkable fightback in a 5-2 win over Crystal Palace in the Premier League that re-ignited his team’s Champions League qualification hopes.
item.dc:creator: Steve Douglas, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Domantas Sabonis set to win 3rd straight NBA rebound title, eyeing another All-NBA spot
item.description: Sacramento's Domantas Sabonis is about to join a pretty special group of rebounders. There are six players in NBA history to win at least three consecutive rebound titles: Wilt Chamberlain, Dennis Rodman, Moses Malone, Kevin Garnett and Andre Drummond.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The NBA's playoff chase will end Sunday. Here's a look at what's happening
item.description: With one day left, the NBA playoff picture is still not in complete focus. It’s crystal-clear in the Eastern Conference, where two playoff matchups are known, the top six seeds are set and the four play-in spots are all locked in. In the Western Conference, there’s still much to be decided.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: US star McKennie, Tonali, Fagioli among 13 players being investigated for illegal gambling
item.description: MILAN (AP) — United States midfielder Weston McKennie is among 13 soccer players being investigated for illegal online betting in Italy, according to widespread media reports. A new investigation by Milan prosecutors stems from evidence given by Sandro Tonali and Nicolò Fagioli in 2023.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NFL great Terry Bradshaw clarifies role in opening jammed plane door after claims of heroism
item.description: A passenger traveling on a flight from Dallas-Forth Worth to Pittsburgh Thursday provided a firsthand account of how a malfunctioning plane door was eventually opened.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Masters: When it starts, how to watch, betting odds for golf's first major of 2025
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Justin Rose remained atop a star-studded leaderboard after the second round of the Masters on Friday, with defending champion Scottie Scheffler, Rory McIlroy and Bryson DeChambeau all within three shots of the lead.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Federal judge rules Trump administration must 'unfreeze' funds to Maine as trans battle lingers
item.description: A major move occurred in the battle between President Donald Trump and the state of Maine Friday, as it was ruled federal funds must be unfrozen.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Joe Flacco is returning to the Cleveland Browns on a 1-year deal
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Joe Flacco is heading back to Cleveland. The veteran NFL quarterback agreed to terms with the Browns on a one-year deal on Friday. Flacco will have a base salary of $4 million but can earn more with incentives.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego senior women's basketball team seeks to compete overseas
item.description: Ten San Diego women over 60 are representing the US in the 17th World MaxiBasketball Championship in Switzerland.
item.dc:creator: Juliette Vara, Fox 5

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: The 2024 World Series Champions, the Los Angeles Dodgers, were honored by President Donald Trump at the White House on Monday before opening a series with the Washington Nationals.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Trump honors Dodgers' 2024 World Series championship team
item.description: President Donald Trump welcomed Shohei Ohtani, Mookie Betts and the reigning champion Los Angeles Dodgers to the White House on Monday to congratulate them for winning the World Series last season. "That is a very good-looking group of people," Trump said as he began his remarks.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: Monarchs suffer first loss of the season in 2-1 battle with Ventura County
item.description: Real Monarchs battled back from a two-goal deficit, pushed late, and nearly snatched a draw from the jaws of defeat for a second straight match - but ultimately fell 2-1.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, Royal Riot Podcast, ABC 4

item.title: Mikheyev, Nazar and Knight lead the Blackhawks to a 3-1 win over the Penguins
item.description: Ilya Mikheyev scored twice, Frank Nazar added a goal and Spencer Knight stopped 28 shots as the Chicago Blackhawks snapped a five-game skid with a 3-1 win over the Pittsburgh Penguins on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: UConn is back on top of women’s basketball, winning its 12th national championship by routing defending champion South Carolina 82-59 on Sunday behind Azzi Fudd’s 24 points.
item.dc:creator: Dough Feinberg, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UConn returns to top of women's basketball, dominates South Carolina 82-59 to capture its 12th title
item.description: Dawn Staley and South Carolina hope to finish off a second straight season with an NCAA championship, which would give the Gamecocks a third title in four years. To do so, they'll need to beat Paige Bueckers and UConn on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alex Ovechkin breaks Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record by scoring his 895th
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Alex Ovechkin fired just about the perfect version of his signature one-timer that has defined his remarkable career. When the puck hit the net, it made him the top goal scorer in NHL history.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Red Rocks roll into the NCAA Nationals again
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - For the 49th straight year, the Utah gymnastics team is headed to the NCAA Nationals. The #4 Red Rocks won their NCAA Regional Final meet, edging past #5 UCLA, Denver and Minnesota on Saturday with a score of 197.825.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
